# Acceptance Criteria

The MVP is accepted when the following workflow works end-to-end:

1. LABS creates an artist profile.
2. Artist completes onboarding tasks.
3. LABS creates or receives an opportunity.
4. LABS generates a roadmap.
5. LABS runs multiple simulation scenarios.
6. LABS selects a recommended scenario.
7. The roadmap generates internal, artist, and client tasks.
8. The artist portal only shows artist-relevant tasks.
9. The client portal only shows client-relevant tasks.
10. LABS HQ shows blocked dependencies and approval status.
11. Contract and billing milestones are tracked.
12. A basic marketing campaign plan is created.
13. The gig can be completed and summarized.
